summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BTC Fractal = 1:1 архитектура SPX Fractal + SPX→BTC Overlay Engine. New page /fractal loads successfully with complete SPX-like structure. Backend overlay APIs working correctly with expected 0 coefficients due to missing training data.

expected_behavior.note: Returns beta=0.0000, rho=0.0000 - expected due to missing btc_candles/spx_candles data

ui_bugs.issue: SPX Overlay Engine detailed section (data-testid='btc-spx-overlay') not rendering in Cross-Asset mode
ui_bugs.impact: User cannot see detailed SPX→BTC influence breakdown
ui_bugs.workaround: SPX overlay data visible in forecast table SPX Overlay column

passed_tests: BTC Fractal Signal API (/api/fractal/signal) - returns NEUTRAL signal
SPX→BTC Overlay Coefficients API (/api/overlay/coeffs) - returns expected 0 values
SPX→BTC Overlay Explanation API (/api/overlay/explain) - returns mock final adjusted +3.00%
BTC Header Strip displays: BULLISH BTC, Confidence 1%, Risk NORMAL, Phase NEUTRAL
BTC Verdict Card shows Market State: BULLISH, Bias: BTC ↑, Projection: +100.24%
Chart modes (Synthetic, Replay, Hybrid, Cross-Asset ★) all functional
Forecast Table includes SPX Overlay column with calculated values
1:1 SPX structure present: Why This Verdict, Risk Context, Historical Analogs
Strategy Controls and Forward Performance sections working
All UI interactions (horizon dropdown, chart mode switching) functional
